query: New Caledonia July 2025 autonomy agreement text Bougival Agreement Elysée-Oudinot Accord key provisions French Parliament bill status 2026

{"query":"New Caledonia July 2025 autonomy agreement text Bougival Agreement Elysée-Oudinot Accord key provisions French Parliament bill status 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1902,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://devpolicy.org/after-bougival-new-caledonias-failed-constitutional-reform-20260504/","title":"After Bougival: New Caledonia's failed constitutional reform - Devpolicy Blog from the Development Policy Centre","content":"This text foreshadowed the creation of a State of New Caledonia within the French Republic and the transformation of New Caledonian citizenship into New Caledonian nationality.
Despite repeated warnings that his government lacked the numbers in parliament, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu forged ahead, introducing the constitutional reform that would replace the Noumea Accord with the Bougival/Elysée-Oudinot agreements.
After adoption by the French Senate in February 2026, the constitutional legislation was scheduled to be debated in the National Assembly in April.
The main independence coalition FLNKS wrote to Lecornu on 12 April, calling for the elections to proceed using the current “frozen” electoral rolls."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bougival_Accord","title":"Bougival Accord - Wikipedia","content":"It was signed on 12 July 2025 in Bougival, France, by Manuel Valls, Minister of the Overseas, and by various leaders of the New Caledonian political parties.
After opening the summit on 2 July 2025, Macron handed day-to-day management of the talks to Minister for Overseas Manuel Valls.
The French state will transfer foreign relations power to the State of New Caledonia, which will conduct diplomatic action with respect for international commitments and the fundamental interests of France (security, defense and vital interests)."},{"url":"https://thediplomat.com/2026/01/new-agreement-expands-on-the-france-new-caledonia-bougival-accord/","title":"New Agreement Expands on the France-New Caledonia Bougival Accord – The Diplomat","content":"Last week, after four days of talks in Paris, a new agreement was reached between French President Emmanuel Macron and five parliamentary groups from New Caledonia."},{"url":"https://www.rfi.fr/en/france/20260403-future-uncertain-in-new-caledonia-after-french-mps-block-reform-plan","title":"Future uncertain in New Caledonia after French MPs block reform plan - RFI","content":"The National Assembly voted 190 to 107 to throw out the bill, put forward by pro-independence MP Emmanuel Tjibaou.
The bill aimed to enshrine in the constitution the main points of the Bougival accord – a 2025 agreement between the French government and New Caledonian political groups on the territory’s future status – later followed by the Elysée-Oudinot agreement in January."},{"url":"https://rsis.edu.sg/rsis-publication/rsis/new-caledonia-a-historic-agreement-for-a-unique-status/","title":"New Caledonia: A Historic Agreement for a Unique Status - RSIS","content":"The main outcome is the creation of a “Caledonian State” within the French Republic – a sui generis status, legally hybrid, situated somewhere between federalism and free association.
Inhabited by the Kanak people for over 3,000 years, New Caledonia was annexed by France in 1853 and initially used as a penal colony.
On 12 July 2025, the French State and New Caledonia’s main political forces – both pro- and anti-independence – reached a landmark agreement.
First, a constitutional reform must be approved by a three-fifths majority of the French Parliament (the National Assembly and Senate convened in Congress) – a considerable challenge given France’s current political volatility and criticisms of the Bougival agreement from key opposition figures such as Marine Le Pen or Jean-Luc Mélenchon.
The Bougival Agreement establishes a legally hybrid status – neither federation nor free associated state – with potentially far-reaching consequences.
In the longer term, the hybrid status proposed in the Bougival Agreement could set a precedent for other French overseas territories – notably French Polynesia, which enjoys a comparable degree of autonomy and is currently led by Moetai Brotherson, a pro-independence president."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"New Caledonia July 2025 autonomy agreement text Bougival Agreement Elysée-Oudinot Accord key provisions French Parliament bill status 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://islandsbusiness.com/news-break/french-senate-votes-yes-on-new-caledonia-law-but-opposition-grows","title":"French Senate votes yes on New Caledonia law, but ...","content":"Feb 25, 2026 — French parliament aims to translate the July 2025 Bougival Accord and the accompanying January 2026 Elysée-Oudinot Accord into law.","score":0.71829855,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://thediplomat.com/2026/01/new-agreement-expands-on-the-france-new-caledonia-bougival-accord","title":"New Agreement Expands on the France-New Caledonia ...","content":"Jan 26, 2026 — The Elysée-Oudinot Accord, reached between France and five parliamentary groups from New Caledonia, augments the 2025 Bougival Accord.","score":0.68874115,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://pina.com.fj/2026/01/21/new-caledonia-agreement-signed-in-paris","title":"New Caledonia agreement signed in Paris | PINA","content":"After four days of talks in Paris, French President Emmanuel Macron and five parliamentary groups from New Caledonia have signed the Elysée-Oudinot Accord – an agreement on constitutional and economic change for the French Pacific dependency. The FLNKS will hold a congress in late January or early February to debate its response to the Elysée-Oudinot agreement and prepare for municipal and provincial elections this year. The wording of the Elysée-Oudinot Accord also suggests that the transfer of the remaining sovereign powers will not guarantee an automatic accession to sovereignty, with the agreement stating: “If all of the State’s sovereign powers were to be transferred to New Caledonia, the partners would meet to discuss the implications for the relationship between the State of New Caledonia and France.”. This will affect the authority of the national Congress and Government of New Caledonia, with the new agreement stating that the laws required to implement Elysée-Oudinot “may provide for a new division of powers between New Caledonian institutions in order to promote economic attractiveness.”.","score":0.65966886,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.jurist.org/news/2025/07/france-signs-agreement-establishing-a-state-of-new-caledonia","title":"France signs agreement establishing a 'State of New ...","content":"France signs agreement establishing a ‘State of New Caledonia’ News. **France signs agreement establishing a ‘State of New Caledonia’**. Representatives of France and the New Caledonian political forces signed an agreement on Saturday establishing a “State of New Caledonia” within the French republic. The agreement, titled “The bet on trust,” provides for the enshrinement of the “State of New Caledonia” in the French Constitution, offering New Caledonia a path to stability and international recognition. In 1998, the Nouméa Accord established a gradual decolonization process over a 20-year period, entailing shared sovereignty between New Caledonia and France, a new dual citizenship for New Caledonians, and full recognition of the indigenous Kanak identity. The agreement also provides for the adoption of the Fundamental Law of New Caledonia in 2026, enshrining its capacity for self-organization, and its power to modify the country’s identity symbols, and incorporate a charter of New Caledonian values.","score":0.63939893,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://rsis.edu.sg/rsis-publication/rsis/new-caledonia-a-historic-agreement-for-a-unique-status","title":"New Caledonia: A Historic Agreement for a Unique Status","content":"Jul 25, 2025 — The Bougival Agreement establishes a legally hybrid status – neither federation nor free associated state – with potentially far-reaching ...Read more","score":0.5923135,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.25,"request_id":"4a1384ab-413c-4fc0-baf1-f8c8cc181c43"}
